title: Poojaiketha Poovidhu Song Lyrics Neethana Andha Kuyil
stanzas:
Poojaiketha Poovidhu Song Lyrics Neethana Andha Kuyil
#Ilaiyaraja

Poojai kaetha poovidhu
nethu thaana poothathu
ada poothadhu yaara adha
paarthadhu.(2)

maela poata thavani
seelai aagi ponadhu
seelai iluthu viduvadhe
velai aagi ponadhu
kokku onnu kokki
poduthu hoi..

Poojai kaetha poovidhu
nethu thaana poothathu
ada poothadhu yaara adha
paarthadhu

achu vella pechula
aala thookkura
konja neram pesuna
kooli kaetkura

Oorellaam unna pathi
verum vaaya mella.
thothaadha yaarum illa
thoodhu solla.

vaai vaartha pombalaiku
pothaadhu pulla
kanjaada pola oru
baashai illai

suthi suthi vandhu ne
soapu podura
kotti pona kudimikku
seepa thaedura

enna paarthu enna kaeta
yaeta yaendi maathura
kaala neram koodi pochu
maala vandhu maathura

Poojai kaetha poovidhu
nethu thaana poothathu
ada poothadhu yaara adha
paarthadhu.(2)

maela poata thavani
seelai aagi ponadhu
seelai iluthu viduvadhe
velai aagi ponadhu
kokku onnu kokki
poduthu hoi..

Poojai kaetha poovidhu
nethu thaana poothathu
ada poothadhu yaara adha
paarthadhu

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Poojaiketha Poovidhu conveys themes of devotion and the beauty of nature, reflecting a deep emotional connection.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Neethana Andha Kuyil, this song is a pivotal moment that highlights the characters' emotional journey and their connection to spirituality.

Who are the singers and music director of the song?

The song features the talented voices of Gangai Amaren and K.S. Chitra, with music composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja.

When was the song released?

Poojaiketha Poovidhu was released on January 13, 1986, making it a cherished classic in Tamil music history.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Poojaiketha Poovidhu from Neethana Andha Kuyil is a beautiful expression of devotion and nostalgia. It evokes a sense of tranquility and connection to nature, making it a perfect piece for relaxation and reflection. The harmonious blend of vocals by Gangai Amaren and K.S. Chitra, combined with Ilaiyaraaja's masterful composition, creates an unforgettable listening experience. This timeless melody continues to resonate with audiences, capturing the essence of heartfelt emotions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Poojaiketha Poovidhu is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of devotion and nostalgia. This enchanting song from Neethana Andha Kuyil showcases the magical collaboration between the legendary Ilaiyaraaja and the soulful voices of Gangai Amaren and K.S. Chitra. Experience the heartfelt emotions and timeless beauty that this classic brings to life.
stanzaMeanings: The flower offered in worship bloomed yesterday; who saw it bloom?
The one who went up is now a beautiful sight; the work of writing is now a task, and it is being prepared.
The flower offered in worship bloomed yesterday; who saw it bloom?
I saw something in the dress, but there is some fear in my heart.
If I look without pain, what if I get married? There is still worry.
When someone talks, it takes a little time to respond.
The flower is falling, and the deer is grazing.
Listening to the talk of the uncle makes me feel good.
Everyone in the town speaks softly about you. No one dares to say anything.
Words spoken by girls are not like those of boys; there is no language like that.
Going around, they put soap; when it is thrown, they look for the foam.
Looking at me, what do you ask? The time has come for the beautiful evening.
The flower offered in worship bloomed yesterday; who saw it bloom?
The one who went up is now a beautiful sight; the work of writing is now a task, and it is being prepared.
The flower offered in worship bloomed yesterday; who saw it bloom?
